---
title: "Nita Kanney, MPH"
description-meta: ""
image: "files/images/nk headshot epi.JPG"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 88%
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a 4th year Doctoral Candidate at the University of Michigan [School of Public Health](https://sph.umich.edu/epid/phdstudents/Kanney_Nita.html) in the Department of Epidemiology.

My research focuses on how one's life course social and environmental factors impact their epigenetics and subsequent health and aging outcomes.
:::
